response.justification: Over 15 years of professional software development with a direct match to the primary stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS CDK used concurrently at Optilyz and re:cinq. Current role explicitly covers AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, satisfying the increasingly rare AI agent requirement. Strong testing culture evidenced by TDD practice across multiple roles, open-source test libraries, and workshop facilitation. The main gaps are Nest.js, which is absent from the resume, and Vitest/Playwright, which are not explicitly called out despite demonstrated testing depth.
strengths: Primary stack match: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS CDK all present in recent roles
Current-role AI agent development experience with MCP frameworks directly satisfies a rare requirement
Deep, demonstrated testing culture: TDD across roles, Fluent-Asserts library author, multi-day testing workshops
concerns: Nest.js is not mentioned anywhere in the resume despite being the primary backend framework
Vitest and Playwright are absent; testing tool experience skews toward custom DLang tooling rather than the listed stack
Kotlin is missing; Java appears only in embedded/robotic-arm context, not backend service development
